mapper.select: SELECT * FROM monthly_monitoring WHERE system_id = #{systemId} ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC
SELECT * FROM monthly_monitoring WHERE system_id = #{systemId} AND year = #{year} AND month = #{month}
SELECT * FROM monthly_monitoring WHERE status = #{status} AND process_status = #{processStatus}
SELECT * FROM monthly_monitoring ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monthly_monitoring (system_id, year, month, status, deadline, approval_required, created_by) VALUES (#{systemId}, #{year}, #{month}, #{status}, #{deadline}, #{approvalRequired}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE monthly_monitoring SET status=#{status}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE monthly_monitoring SET process_status=#{processStatus}, process_percent=#{processPercent}, process_msg=#{processMsg}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE monthly_monitoring SET deadline=#{deadline} WHERE id=#{id}
